code: const API_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'http://localhost:8080/api';export const generateFractal=async config=>{try{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/fractal/generate"),{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(config)});const data=await response.json();if(!response.ok){return{success:false,error:data.message||data.error||'An error occurred'};}return data;}catch(error){return{success:false,error:error instanceof Error?error.message:'Network error'};}};
